sources.title: Black Nationalist Politics and the Dilemma of the Second World War
Afrikaners and the Second World War by Rodney Warwick
Anti-Fascism in South Africa 1933-1945, and its Legacies by Jonathan Hyslop
Gen. J.B.M. Hertzog is forced to resign as premier after his motion of neutrality in World War II is defeated in parliament
The charter of the United Nations is adopted in San Francisco, with SA prime minister Gen. Smuts present

slides.title: IMpi Yomhlaba Yesibili (1939-1945)
slides.lead: Impi ebulale abantu abaningi kunazo zonke emlandweni wesintu - nokuthi yafinyelela kanjani kwaze kwaba seNingizimu Afrika nakuyo yonke i-Afrika.

media.alt: Isithombe esimnyama semephu yomhlaba esinqamula imicibisholo, phezu kwengxenye emnyama neqhakazile ebonisa umhlaba osempini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#2b2b33'/><rect width='320' height='90' fill='#3a3a45'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='60' fill='#4a5a6a'/><path d='M120 70 q20 -14 42 0 q22 -8 38 6 M110 100 q30 12 60 0 q28 10 50 -2' stroke='#7a8b5a' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M40 30 L110 70' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M280 30 L210 70' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M60 150 L120 118' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M260 150 L200 118' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vula ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi yini abasazi ngayo ngeMpi Yomhlaba Yesibili - amafilimu, izindaba zomndeni, izikhumbuzo. Beka phansi imibono emikhulu emibili yalesi sifundo: (1) kwakuyimpi yangempela yomhlaba wonke enezimbangela ezicacile namaphuzu okuphenduka, futhi (2) yayingekho nje 'laphaya' eYurophu kuphela - abaseNingizimu Afrika nabanye base-Afrika balwa, bafa futhi bashintsha umlando ngenxa yayo. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi impi yomhlaba isho ukulwa emazwekazini amaningi ngesikhathi esisodwa.

slides.title: Izimbangela zeMpi Yomhlaba Yesibili
slides.lead: IMpi Yesibili Yomhlaba yavela ezindabeni ezazingakapheli zeMpi Yokuqala Yomhlaba.

blocks.text: Ngemva kweMpi Yokuqala Yomhlaba, i-**Treaty of Versailles (1919)** (isivumelwano sokuthula) yajezisa iJalimane ngezinkokhelo ezinkulu nangokulahlekelwa umhlaba. Lapho i-**Great Depression** (ukuwohloka okukhulu komnotho) iletha ukungasebenzi kwabaningi ngeminyaka yawo-1930, abantu abathukuthele nabaphelelwe yithemba baphendukela kubabusi abanobushiqela (odikthetha) ababethembisa ukwenza izizwe zabo zibe namandla futhi.

items: U-**Adolf Hitler** neqembu lamaNazi bathatha amandla eJalimane ngo-1933, beshumayela ubandlululo nokuziphindiselela.
Ababusi abanobushiqela e-Italy (uMussolini) namasosha aseJapane babefuna ukwakha imibuso emikhulu ngamandla.
I-League of Nations (Inhlangano Yezizwe) yayibuthaka kakhulu ukumisa udlame, futhi amanye amazwe azama ukugwema impi ngokuvumela izidingo zabahlaseli (i-appeasement, ukuthobisa).

slides.notes: Dweba umugqa wembangela nomphumela: ukuthula okulukhuni + ukuwa komnotho + impendulo ebuthaka yamazwe omhlaba = ukuvela kwababusi abanobushiqela abanodlame. Chaza 'i-appeasement' (ukuthobisa) ngendlela elula - iBrithani neFrance zavumela uHitler ukuthi ephule imithetho, zinethemba lokuthi uzoyeka. Akayekanga. Xhumanisa nesihloko seBanga 8 esimayelana neMpi Yokuqala Yomhlaba ukuze abafundi babone ukuxhumana phakathi kwezimpi ezimbili.

slides.title: Ukuqubuka kwempi
slides.lead: Ngomhla ka-1 Septhemba 1939 iJalimane yahlasela iPoland, futhi umhlaba wawusempini futhi.

blocks.text: Ngemva kokuthatha i-Austria ne-Czechoslovakia, iJalimane yahlasela i-**Poland ngomhla ka-1 Septhemba 1939**. Emuva kwezinsuku ezimbili iBrithani neFrance zamemezela impi ngokumelene neJalimane. Ukuhlasela okusheshayo kweJalimane ngamathangi nezindiza kwaqanjwa igama elithi **Blitzkrieg** ('impi yombani').

items: Maphakathi no-1940 iJalimane yayisinqobe iFrance nengxenye enkulu yeNtshonalanga Yurophu.
Izinhlangothi ezimbili zaziwa ngokuthi yi-**Axis** (iJalimane, i-Italy, iJapane) ne-**Allies** (iBrithani, iFrance, kamuva iUSSR ne-USA).
IBrithani nombuso wayo - kuhlanganisa neNingizimu Afrika - manje yayimelene neJalimane lamaNazi.

media.alt: Imicibisholo ekhukhula inqamula imephu elula yeYurophu ebonisa ukuhlasela okusheshayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='160' height='100' rx='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='96' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 80 L150 80' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='8' marker-end='url(#a)'/><path d='M150 80 l-16 -8 v16 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M70 55 L130 55' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M130 55 l-14 -7 v14 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M70 105 L130 105' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M130 105 l-14 -7 v14 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qinisa usuku lokuqala: 1 Septhemba 1939. Chaza i-Blitzkrieg ngesithombe - amathangi nezindiza ezaziphonsa amabhomu zihamba ngesivinini esikhulu kangangokuba abavikeli babengakwazi ukuhlela. Yenza kucace ukuthi kungani iNingizimu Afrika yayihileleka nhlobo: njengengxenye yoMbuso WaseBrithani neCommonwealth, umbuzo wokungena empini wafika ngqo ephalamende laseNingizimu Afrika, okuyisayidi elilandelayo.

slides.title: Izindawo ezinkulu zempi
slides.lead: Ukulwa kwasabalala ezifundeni ezintathu ezinkulu, noma 'amathiyetha' (izindawo zempi), zomhlaba.

blocks.heading: IYurophu
blocks.text: IJalimane yalwa neBrithani entshonalanga, kanti kusukela ngo-1941, yalwa neSoviet Union empumalanga - impi enkulu kunazo zonke emhlabathini emlandweni.

blocks.heading: INyakatho Afrika
blocks.text: Amabutho e-Allies ne-Axis alwa ogwadule ukuze alawule i-Suez Canal namafutha. AbaseNingizimu Afrika balwa lapha.

blocks.heading: I-Asia nePacific
blocks.text: Ngemva kokuba iJapane ihlasele iPearl Harbor ngoDisemba 1941, i-USA yajoyina impi yalwa neJapane kulo lonke uLwandle iPacific.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa la makhadi amathathu ukunika abafundi imephu yomqondo. Gcizelela ukuthi lezi zindawo zazixhumene: ukwehlulwa endaweni eyodwa kwakuthinta ezinye. Khomba iNyakatho Afrika ngokukhethekile, ngoba yilapho amasosha amaningi aseNingizimu Afrika akhonza khona. Qaphela isikhathi esibalulekile lapho i-USA ingena khona ngemva kwePearl Harbor (7 Disemba 1941), okwashintsha isilinganiso saya ohlangothini lwe-Allies.

slides.title: Amaphuzu okuphenduka kwempi

blocks.alt: Uhlelo lwezikhathi lwamaphuzu abalulekile okuphenduka eMpini Yomhlaba Yesibili kusukela ngo-1939 kuya ku-1945.

events.label: IJalimane ihlasela iUSSR; iJapane ihlasela iPearl Harbor, i-USA iyajoyina
Izimpi zaseStalingrad nase-El Alamein ziyashintsha isimo sempi
I-D-Day: i-Allies ifika eFrance ngomhla ka-6 Juni
IJalimane iyazinikela (Meyi); amabhomu enuzi, iJapane iyazinikela (Agasti)

slides.notes: 'Iphuzu lokuphenduka' yisikhathi esishintsha isiqondiso sempi. Gcizelela u-1942 njengonyaka lapho isimo saphenduka khona: iStalingrad yamisa iJalimane empumalanga, kanti i-El Alamein (lapho abaseNingizimu Afrika balwa khona) yamisa iJalimane eNyakatho Afrika. Cela abafundi baqaphele ukuthi impi yasabalala kanjani iphuma ngo-1939 bese ivalela iJalimane neJapane phakathi ngo-1945.

slides.title: IHolocaust
slides.lead: AmaNazi enza ukubulawa ngamabomu kwabantu abangamaJuda abayizigidi eziyisithupha.

blocks.text: AmaNazi ayekholelwa ukuthi ezinye 'izinhlanga' zazingcono kunezinye. Aphuca abantu abangamaJuda amalungelo abo, abaphoqelela emalokishini avaliweyo (ama-ghetto), abese ebulala cishe **amaJuda ayizigidi eziyisithupha** ezinkanjini zoboya nezokubulala njenge-Auschwitz. Lokhu kubulawa kohlanga kubizwa ngokuthi yi-**Holocaust** (ngesiHeberu, i-*Shoah*).

items: AmaNazi abulala futhi abantu bamaRoma, abantu abakhubazekile, abaphikisi bezepolitiki nabanye.
I-Holocaust ibonisa ukuthi ubandlululo nenzondo kungaholela kuphi lapho umbuso unamandla apheleleyo.
Ngemva kwempi, umhlaba wathembisa ukuthi 'akusoze kwenzeka futhi' wase uqala ukubhala imithetho emisha yamalungelo abantu.

media.alt: Ilangabi likakhandlela elilodwa ebumnyameni, uphawu lokukhumbula izisulu ze-Holocaust.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 180' role='img'><rect width='160' height='180' fill='#2b2b33'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='28' height='64' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='60' y='156' width='40' height='10' rx='2' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M80 58 q-14 20 0 34 q14 -14 0 -34 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M80 70 q-7 12 0 22 q7 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha lesi sayidi ngokunakekela nangokuqonda kwaso. Gcina izinga lokufunda lilula kodwa ungathambisi iqiniso: lokhu kwakuyibulala elihleliwe, lasemkhakheni wemboni, labantu abayizigidi abangenacala. Xhumanisa nalokho abafundi abazokufunda ngobandlululo eNingizimu Afrika - ingozi yokufundisa ukuthi elinye iqembu labantu libaluleke kancane kunelinye. Lesi futhi yisikhathi esihle sokuxhumanisa phambili ne-Universal Declaration of Human Rights (1948).

slides.title: INingizimu Afrika inquma ukulwa
slides.lead: NgoSepthemba 1939 iphalamende laseNingizimu Afrika kwadingeka likhethe: ukungathathi hlangothi, noma ukujoyina i-Allies?

blocks.text: UNdunankulu u-**J.B.M. Hertzog** wayefuna iNingizimu Afrika ingathathi hlangothi, kodwa iphini lakhe u-**Jan Smuts** wayefuna ukulwa eceleni kweBrithani. Ngomhla ka-4 Septhemba 1939 iphalamende lavotela impi. UHertzog wesula, kanti u-**Smuts waba nguNdunankulu** nomholi omkhulu we-Allies.

items: Ivoti lahlukanisa kakhulu ezombusazwe zabamhlophe phakathi kwama-Afrikaner asekela impi nawaphikisa impi.
Ibutho laseNingizimu Afrika lalilincane ngo-1939 kodwa lakhula ngokushesha ngamavolontiya.
Akekho eNingizimu Afrika owaphoqwa (owakhonza ngenkani) ukulwa phesheya kwezilwandle - amasosha azinikela ngokuzithandela.

media.alt: Igumbi lephalamende linevoti lezandla eziphakemeyo nomngcele ohlukanisayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='40' width='80' height='90' rx='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='130' y='40' width='80' height='90' rx='4' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='116' y='34' width='8' height='102' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='72' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='94' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='50' cy='84' r='6'/><circle cx='72' cy='84' r='6'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='172' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='194' cy='60' r='6'/></g><rect x='68' y='40' width='4' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisikhathi esibalulekile saseNingizimu Afrika. Chaza ukuthi isinqumo sasingacacile: ama-Afrikaner amaningi ayekhumbula iMpi YaseNingizimu Afrika ngokumelene neBrithani futhi ayengafuni ukulwela uMbuso WaseBrithani. Ivoti lephalamende elincane (cishe 80 kuya ku-67) lahlukanisa izwe. Yethula uSmuts njengesikhulu somhlaba esizovela futhi ekugcineni kwesifundo ekusekelweni kweZizwe Ezihlangene. [SME] Qinisekisa isilinganiso esiqondile sevoti (esivame ukushiwo njengo-80-67) ngaphambi kokushicilela.

slides.title: Ama-Afrika ekulweni
slides.lead: Abantu baseNingizimu Afrika abangaphezu kuka-300,000 bazinikela ngokuzithandela - futhi uhlanga lwaba nomthelela endleleni ababevunyelwe ngayo ukukhonza.

blocks.text: Amasosha aseNingizimu Afrika asiza ekuxoshweni kwama-Italiya e-**East Africa (Abyssinia/Ethiopia)** ngo-1941 futhi alwa kanzima **ogwadule waseNyakatho Afrika**. Kulo lonke izwekazi, amakhulukhulu ezinkulungwane zamasosha nabathwali base-Afrika akhonza emzabalazweni wempi we-Allies.

items: Abantu abamnyama nabeBala baseNingizimu Afrika bakhonza ku-Native Military Corps naku-Cape Corps, kodwa uhulumeni wawuvame ukwenqaba ukuhlomisa amasosha amnyama, ewasebenzisa njengabashayeli, onogada nezisebenzi.
U-**Job Maseko**, isosha elimnyama laseNingizimu Afrika, ladume ngokucwilisa umkhumbi waseJalimane echwebeni laseTobruk futhi laklonyeliswa iMilitary Medal.
E-**Tobruk (Juni 1942)** izinkulungwane zamasosha aseNingizimu Afrika athunjwa lapho idolobha liwela emabuthweni aseJalimane.

media.alt: Izithombe ezimnyama zamasosha ehamba anqamula amaduna ogwadule ngaphansi kwelanga elishisayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f6e2b8'/><circle cx='196' cy='40' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 120 q60 -24 120 0 t120 0 v40 H0 Z' fill='#c8a15a'/><g fill='#4a3b28'><circle cx='60' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='54' y='104' width='12' height='24'/><circle cx='96' cy='92' r='8'/><rect x='90' y='100' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='132' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='126' y='104' width='12' height='24'/></g><rect x='60' y='84' width='3' height='18' fill='#4a3b28'/><rect x='96' y='80' width='3' height='18' fill='#4a3b28'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sayidi siphethe ukugxila kwe-CAPS eNingizimu Afrika nase-Afrika. Gcizelela ukungabi nabulungiswa: abantu abamnyama baseNingizimu Afrika babeka izimpilo zabo engozini kodwa benqatshelwa izikhali nomholo olinganayo ngenxa yenqubomgomo yobandlululo, futhi babuyela ekhaya bengenamklomelo. Sebenzisa uJob Maseko njengesibonelo esiqondile nesikhumbulekayo sesibindi. Veza ukuthi ulwazi lwempi, nokuzenzisa kokulwa nobandlululo lwamaNazi phesheya kuyilapho bebhekene nobandlululo ekhaya, kwakhulisa ukukhula kwezinhlangano zezombusazwe zabamnyama. [SME] Qinisekisa inani lamavolontiya (~334,000) nenani leziboshwa zempi zaseTobruk ngomthombo ngaphambi kokushicilela.

slides.title: Ukuphikisana nempi ekhaya
slides.lead: Akubona bonke abantu eNingizimu Afrika ababeseka i-Allies - abanye babenconca ngokusobala iJalimane lamaNazi.

blocks.text: I-**Ossewabrandwag (OB)** kwakuyinhlangano enkulu yama-Afrikaner eyayiphikisa impi futhi izwelana neJalimane lamaNazi. Amanye amalungu enza ukucekela phansi, kanti uhulumeni wavalela (wabophela ngaphandle kokuqulwa kwecala) amakhulu awo ngesikhathi sempi.

items: URobey Leibbrandt, owayekade eyingqwele yesibhakela yama-Olympic, wabanjwa ezama ukuhlela ukuphikisa okuhlomileyo kweJalimane.
Lokhu kwahlukana kwajulisa ubuzwe bama-Afrikaner futhi kwafaka esandleni sezombusazwe ngemva kwempi.
Ngesikhathi esifanayo, abanye abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika - bazo zonke izinhlanga - baphikisa ngokuqinile ubufascist nobandlululo.

media.alt: Isimo sezwe esihlukaniswe ufa oluhluzukile lube izingxenye ezimbili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 40 h60 l6 20 l-6 20 l6 20 l-6 20 h-60 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M112 40 h68 v120 h-68 l6 -20 l-6 -20 l6 -20 l-6 -20 z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M106 36 l6 24 l-6 20 l6 24 l-6 24' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi izwe elisempini alivamile ukuba lihlangene. Amanye ama-Afrikaner ayebona impi njengempi yeBrithani, hhayi eyawo, kanti inani elincane lasekela ngokusebenzayo iJalimane lamaNazi. Ungalubukisi kakhulu lolu daba - abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika basekela i-Allies - kodwa kubalulekile ngoba lezi zinhlangano zabumba ezombusazwe ngemva kwesikhathi, zifaka esandleni ukukhuphuka kweNational Party ngo-1948 (iyunithi elilandelayo). Linganisela isithombe ngokubala abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika abaphikisa ubufascist.

slides.title: Impilo ekhaya
slides.lead: Impi yashintsha impilo yansuku zonke nomnotho kubantu abangazange bawushiye iNingizimu Afrika.

blocks.text: Ngamadoda asempini, **abesifazane** bangena ngobuningi obukhulu emisebenzini yezimboni namahhovisi. Izimboni zaguqukela ekwenzeni izinsiza zempi, okwakhulisa imboni yaseNingizimu Afrika futhi kwadonsela izisebenzi eziningi ezimnyama emadolobheni.

items: Izimpahla ezinjengophethiloli nokudla zazinqunywa (ku-rationing) futhi amanani anyuka.
Ukukhula okusheshayo kwezimboni kwandisa ukuthuthela kwabantu base-Afrika emadolobheni nokugcwala kakhulu emalokishini.
Lezi zinguquko zesikhathi sempi zasiza ukubeka isisekelo semizabalazo yezombusazwe yeminyaka yawo-1940 nawo-1950.

media.alt: Imboni enezimbotshana ezishunqisa intuthu eceleni kwamabhokisi ezinsiza abekelene.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='24' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='90' height='50' fill='#5a6b7a'/><rect x='44' y='50' width='12' height='20' fill='#5a6b7a'/><rect x='72' y='44' width='12' height='26' fill='#5a6b7a'/><circle cx='50' cy='40' r='8' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='62' cy='32' r='10' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='80' cy='34' r='9' fill='#dcd3c2'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='150' y='96' width='30' height='24'/><rect x='182' y='96' width='30' height='24'/><rect x='166' y='72' width='30' height='24'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Xhumanisa impi nezinguquko zomphakathi nezomnotho abafundi abangazihlobanisa nazo. Umbono osemqoka uwukuthi impi ephambili yabangela izinguquko ekhaya: umsebenzi wabesifazane, ukukhula kwezimboni, futhi ngaphezu kwakho konke igagasi lezisebenzi zase-Afrika ezithuthela emadolobheni. Lokhu kuthuthela emadolobheni - nezimo ezimbi ezeza nakho - kuxhunywe ngqo nezombusazwe zokuphikisa zeyunithi elilandelayo le-CAPS mayelana no-1948 nawo-1950.

slides.title: Ukuthi impi yaphela kanjani - nezindleko zayo
slides.lead: Ngo-1945 amandla e-Axis ayehluliwe, kodwa ngezindleko ezishaqisayo zempilo yabantu.

blocks.text: IJalimane yazinikela ngo-**Meyi 1945**. Ukuze iqede impi ngokumelene neJapane, i-USA yaphonsa amabhomu enuzi e-**Hiroshima naseNagasaki** ngo-Agasti 1945, kwathi iJapane yazinikela. Kwakungokokuqala izikhali zenuzi zisetshenziswa empini.

items: Kulinganiselwa ukuthi abantu abayi-**zigidi eziyi-60 noma ngaphezulu** bafa - abaningi babo bezakhamuzi ezingezona amasosha.
Ingxenye enkulu yeYurophu ne-Asia yayilele emanxiweni, kanti izigidi zaba yizimbacu.
Impi yashiya amandla amakhulu amabili amasha, i-USA neUSSR, okwathi ukuncintisana kwawo kwaba yiMpi Yomshoshaphansi (Cold War).

media.alt: Ithanga ledolobha elonakele nejuba lokuthula elindiza phezu kwezinsalela.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='24' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a8f96'><rect x='24' y='80' width='24' height='40'/><path d='M56 120 v-30 l10 -8 v38 z'/><rect x='74' y='70' width='22' height='50'/><rect x='104' y='96' width='20' height='24'/><rect x='132' y='84' width='24' height='36'/></g><path d='M170 60 q18 -10 34 -2 q-10 2 -14 10 q14 -2 22 6 q-20 6 -34 -2 q-6 -6 -8 -12 z' fill='#4a5a6a'/><path d='M204 58 l14 -8 l-8 12 z' fill='#4a5a6a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Imibono emibili okumele ihlale lapha: ubungako bokufa (ikakhulukazi izakhamuzi ezijwayelekile, hhayi amasosha kuphela) nokufika kwenkathi yenuzi. Amabhomu enuzi ayibhuloho eliya esihlokweni esilandelayo seBanga 9, i-Nuclear Age neMpi Yomshoshaphansi. Qaphela ukuthi isibalo sabafileyo siyisilinganiso - izazi-mlando zinikeza ububanzi. Gcizelela ukuthi impi ayizange nje iqede izinkinga; yadala ukuncintisana okusha okuyingozi phakathi kwe-USA neUSSR. [SME] Izilinganiso zabafileyo zisukela cishe kwizigidi ezingu-60 kuya ku-85; qinisekisa isibalo esisetshenziswa yincwadi yesikole.

slides.title: Ukwakha umhlaba omusha: iZizwe Ezihlangene (United Nations)
slides.lead: Emanxiweni empi, izizwe zazama ukwakha uhlelo lokugcina ukuthula.

blocks.text: Thina bantu beZizwe Ezihlangene sizimisele ukusindisa izizukulwane ezizayo esifweni sempi...

NgoJuni 1945, izizwe ezingu-50 zahlangana e-**San Francisco** zasayina uMqulu we-**Zizwe Ezihlangene (UN)**, inhlangano yokuxazulula izingxabano ngokuthula. UNdunankulu waseNingizimu Afrika u-**Jan Smuts** wasiza ukubhala isingeniso esidumileyo soMqulu.

items: I-UN yathatha indawo ye-League of Nations eyayihlulekile yeminyaka yawo-1920 nawo-1930.
Ngo-1948 i-UN yamukela i-Universal Declaration of Human Rights (Isimemezelo Somhlaba Wonke Samalungelo Abantu).
Ngokuxaka, i-UN kamuva yaba yizwi eliphambili elimelene nobandlululo (apartheid) eNingizimu Afrika.

slides.notes: Phetha isifundo ngemiphumela nethemba. Chaza ukuxaka okujulile i-CAPS efuna abafundi bakuqaphele: uSmuts wasiza ukubhala amazwi ahloniphekile ngesithunzi sabantu e-UN, kodwa uhulumeni ayewuhola wawusenqabela amalungelo abantu abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika ekhaya - futhi i-UN efanayo kamuva yagxeka ubandlululo. Le ngxabano iyibhuloho elinamandla eliya emayunithini amaphuzu okuphenduka aseNingizimu Afrika. Chaza 'isingeniso' njengesitatimende sokuvula sezinhloso.

slides.title: Esikufundile
slides.lead: IMpi Yomhlaba Yesibili kwakuyimpi yomhlaba wonke eyabumba kabusha umhlaba wonke - kuhlanganisa neNingizimu Afrika.

blocks.text: Silandele impi kusukela ezimbangeleni zayo (**izimbangela** - ukuthula okulukhuni, i-Depression nokukhuphuka kwababusi abanobushiqela), sadlula **emaphuzwini okuphenduka**, ubushayabhula be-**Holocaust**, isinqumo seNingizimu Afrika sokulwa neqhaza lamasosha ase-Afrika, impilo **ekhaya**, kwathi ekugcineni **imiphumela** nokusekelwa kweZizwe Ezihlangene.

blocks.question: Chaza izimbangela ezimbili zeMpi Yomhlaba Yesibili.
Kungani u-1942 (i-El Alamein neStalingrad) uchazwa njengephuzu lokuphenduka kwempi?
Chaza ukuthi uhlanga lwaba nomthelela kanjani endleleni abantu abamnyama baseNingizimu Afrika ababevunyelwe ngayo ukubamba iqhaza empini.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le mibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhalwayo noma ingxoxo yasekilasini; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela izitayela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nokubhala okwandisiweyo. Khuthaza abafundi ukuthi basebenzise ubufakazi obuqondile (izinsuku, amagama afana noSmuts noJob Maseko, izindawo ezifana neTobruk). Vala ngokuxhumanisa phambili: imiphumela yempi - ukuthuthela emadolobheni, ubuzwe bama-Afrikaner, iMpi Yomshoshaphansi ne-UN - konke kufaka ngqo emayunithini elandelayo eBanga 9 mayelana ne-Nuclear Age namaphuzu okuphenduka aseNingizimu Afrika ngemva kuka-1948.
